parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 8601 country code of the country of interest

parameters.name: results_per_page
parameters.description: The number of results to include on a page of search results.

parameters.name: what
parameters.description: The keywords to search for. Multiple terms may be space separated.

parameters.name: what_and
parameters.description: The keywords to search for, all keywords must be found.

parameters.name: what_phrase
parameters.description: An entire phrase which must be found in the description or title.

parameters.name: what_or
parameters.description: The keywords to search for, any keywords may be found. Multiple terms may be space separated.

parameters.name: what_exclude
parameters.description: Keywords to exclude from the search. Multiple terms may be space separated.

parameters.name: title_only
parameters.description: Keywords to find, but only in the title. Multiple terms may be space separated.

parameters.name: where
parameters.description: The geographic centre of the search. Place names, postal codes, etc. may be used.

parameters.name: distance
parameters.description: The distance in kilometres from the centre of the place described by the 'where' parameter. Defaults to 5km.

parameters.name: location0
parameters.description: The location fields may be used to describe a location, in a similar form to that returned in a Adzuna::API::Response::Location object. For example, 'location0=UK&location1=South East England&location2=Surrey' will performn a search over the county of Surrey.

parameters.name: max_days_old
parameters.description: The age of the oldest advertisment in days that will be returned.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: The category tag, as returned by the "category" endpoint.

parameters.name: sort_dir
parameters.description: The direction to order the search results.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The ordering of the search results.

parameters.name: salary_min
parameters.description: The minimum salary we wish to get results for.

parameters.name: salary_max
parameters.description: The maximum salary we wish to get results for.

parameters.name: salary_include_unknown
parameters.description: If set it '1', jobs without a known salary are returned.

parameters.name: full_time
parameters.description: If set to '1', only full time jobs will be returned.

parameters.name: part_time
parameters.description: If set to '1', only part time jobs will be returned.

parameters.name: contract
parameters.description: If set to '1', only contract jobs will be returned.

parameters.name: permanent
parameters.description: If set to '1', only permanent jobs will be returned.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: The canonical company name. This may be returned in a Adzuna::API::Response::Company object when a job is returned.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 8601 country code of the country of interest

parameters.description: ISO 8601 country code of the country of interest

parameters.name: location0
parameters.description: The locationN fields may be used to describe a location, in a similar form to that returned in a Adzuna::API::Response::Location object.  For example, 'location0=UK&location1=South East England&location2=Surrey' will performn a search over the county of Surrey.

parameters.name: months
parameters.description: The number of months back for which to retrieve data.

get.summary: Returns the current version of this API
get.description: Returns the current version of this API

count.description: The total number of advertisements found.

mean.description: The mean salary across all the results.

results.description: Results of the job search in the order requested.

locations.description: The number of live job ads in any given location, followed by a list of sub-locations and the number of live jobs in each of them, ordered from most jobs to least. Locations with 0 jobs are not returned.

api_version.description: The major version of the API.

software_version.description: The version of the software providing the API.

histogram.description: The distribution of jobs by salary. Returns an object with salary values as keys (strings) and the number of live jobs that pay as much or more than each salary as values (integers).

additionalProperties.description: Number of jobs at or above this salary level

display_name.description: A human readable name for the location.

area.description: A description of the location, as an array of strings, each refining the location more than the previous.

tag.description: The string which should be passed to search endpoint using the "category" query parameter.

label.description: A text string describing the category, suitable for display.

display_name.description: The name of the company, in the form provided by the advertiser.

canonical_name.description: A normalised string of the company name.

count.description: The total number of job advertisements posted by this company. Only provided for statistics queries.

average_salary.description: The average salary in job advertisements posted by this company. Only provided for statistics queries.

count.description: The number of jobs advertised at this location.

exception.description: A string representing the class of exception.

display.description: A human readable friendly error message for display.

doc.description: A URL linking to the relevant documentation.

id.description: A string uniquely identifying the advertisement.

description.description: The details of the advertisement, truncated to 500 characters.

created.description: The date the advertisement was placed, as an ISO 8601 date time string.

redirect_url.description: A URL that redirects to the advertisement on the advertiser's site. Use this URL to send users to the advertiser's site to comply with Adzuna's terms and conditions.

adref.description: A string which may be used with the 'ad' endpoint to re-retrieve this advertisement in the future. You may do this to confirm that the advertisement is still current.

latitude.description: The latitude of the workspace in degrees.

longitude.description: The longitude of the workspace in degrees

salary_min.description: The bottom end of the pay scale for this job, given in the local currency.

salary_max.description: The top end of the pay scale for this job, given in the local currency.

salary_is_predicted.description: '1' if the salary was predicted by our Jobsworth tool, '0' otherwise.

contract_time.description: Either 'full_time' or 'part_time' to indicate the hours of the job.

contract_type.description: Either 'permanent' or 'contract' to indicate whether the job is permanent or just a short-term contract.

leaderboard.description: A list of companies, ordered by the number of jobs they are advertising. Only companies in Adzunaâs index will show up in these results. To suggest an addition to this index please email: info [at] adzuna [dot] com

results.description: An array of all the categories discovered as Adzuna::API::Response::Category objects.

month.description: A series of average salary values, by month, for all jobs with a given category, title and/or location. This is only available for locations with significant numbers (20 or more) of jobs. Dates are formatted as ISO 8601 month/year (e.g., '2025-08'). Salaries are given in local currency.
